caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, black headphones, and a black hoodie with "BOSS TALK" printed in gold letters across the chest is seated in a recording studio. He sits behind a dark table equipped with a professional microphone on a swivel arm and a black mug featuring "BOSS TALK" branding. The background is a white wall featuring a repeating logo that reads "UNIQUE HUSTLE" accompanied by gold stars. A blue banner at the top reads "Where BOSSES Talk!". Throughout the sequence, the man remains seated and facing forward, speaking into the microphone. His facial expression shifts slightly as he talks, with his mouth moving and his gaze drifting slightly to the side. The camera angle remains static, focusing on the man from the waist up, with no other people present in the frame.
